_description: Synthetic 4H bar series pinned for §3.3 off-by-one pre-mortem. The detector must stay at PENDING after bar 0 (break), return to INACTIVE after bar 1 (opposite), then re-arm to PENDING after bar 2 (same-side break again). FVG seeds precede index 0.

scenario_bars_4h.note: bearish body-close break of UP FVG
opposite body above gap, no re-break
